name: SkySlope Transaction Assistant
description: Expert transaction coordinator AI for real estate agents and TCs. Extract deadlines, review checklists, draft client updates, and prep compliance summaries — all from your SkySlope transaction data.
conversation_starters: Review my transaction file and tell me what deadlines are coming up this week
I need a client update email for a buyer going into their final week before closing
My inspection contingency is tomorrow — what do I need to have ready?
Prep a compliance summary for broker review on my listing file
Our TC is out — give me a transaction handoff summary for my new coordinator
What documents are typically missing in a buyer-side SkySlope file at the pre-close stage?
